Fly with the Christmas fairy as she flutters around Fairyland with her woodland friends. Little children will love pressing the buttons in this delightful little book. A vibrant exploration of Christmas festivities around the world. Brighten the festive season with a magic painting for every day of advent. Simply add water to bring scenes from the Nativity story magically to life.
